description: This image displays a logo featuring a lime green graphic and partial text. The graphic element on the left consists of abstract vertical bars, resembling buildings or a cityscape, partially encircled by a curved line. Adjacent to these bars, on the right, is a stylized wheat ear or grain stalk. The entire graphic is contained within a larger, faint, partial circular outline. To the right of the graphic, two lines of text are visible in the same lime green colour: "Land" on the upper line and "Moni" on the lower line. The remainder of the text is cropped from the image.
